_comment: NetFRAME infrastructure knowledge model. Entities + directed dependencies (dependent depends_on dependency). netframe_knowledge.py computes blast radius (transitive dependents) so the interpreter states impact deterministically instead of guessing. Keep in sync with the netframe-topology repo.

randy.role: SuperMicro storage keystone (PBS + ZFS); single biggest SPOF

randy_registry_pv.role: local-ZFS PV for the private registry

rke2_pvcs.role: RKE2 stateful pods using NFS PVCs

llm_router.role: OpenAI-compatible router (:8000); the only path Open WebUI has to a model

llm_router_fw.role: iptables allowlist on :8000 (llm-router-lock); llm_router has no auth of its own

llm_router_bind.role: LLM_ROUTER_HOST=0.0.0.0; loopback bind makes the router unreachable off-host

npm.role: nginx-proxy-manager (CT101, .181); reverse proxy + TLS + Basic auth for every published hostname

pihole_dns_records.role: Pi-hole local DNS records; public hostnames -> private .181 are rebind-stripped without them

netframe_monitor.role: the collector/interpreter itself; every report and check originates here

dependencies.impact: NFS export offline
backup datastore offline
restic target offline
registry PV offline
RKE2 stateful pods lose their volumes; workloads degrade or hang
image pulls fail; new/rescheduled deployments blocked cluster-wide
no new guest backups; recovery points stop advancing
Jarvis operational memory stops being backed up (DR risk)
Ares workstation backup stops
SIEM offline; security visibility lost
student GPU jobs stop; reduced workload performance
Grafana/alerting/logs offline; the estate goes unobserved
gateway/firewall/DNS-forward down; WAN + inter-VLAN routing lost
storage unreachable at L2
GPU host unreachable at L2
cluster heartbeat disrupted; quorum at risk
inter-node/VLAN path lost
no local inference; every LLM-backed feature degrades or stops
router cannot serve model=local/rag; 503 unless the Claude fallback is keyed
router offline
loopback bind: router stays 'active' and answers on localhost, but is unreachable from every other host
allowlist wrong/absent: NPM and Open WebUI are dropped at :8000; llm.netframe.local returns 502
chat UI still loads, but every message fails - the failure is invisible from the page alone
chat UI offline
chat.netframe.local unreachable
every published hostname unreachable (vault/grafana/homepage/wazuh/health/console/chat/llm)
published hostnames stop resolving for all LAN clients (rebind protection strips private answers)
console.kylemason.org unreachable
console loads but cannot answer questions
console serves stale or empty state
health.kylemason.org unreachable
report page goes stale
all monitoring stops; absence of alerts stops meaning health (NetframeMonitorStale dead-man covers this)
nothing new to back up; operational memory stops advancing
